prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f45f5ca7`.
codex_response:
Implemented `f45f5ca7` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: every nonzero singleton in column 0 moves horizontally to a fixed column by color, with row preserved: `8 -> 1`, `2 -> 2`, `4 -> 3`, `3 -> 4`. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples exactly, so no `notes.md` was needed.

The package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f45f5ca7/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f45f5ca7/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_f45f5ca7/generator.py#L32). The verifier stays in RE-ARC `x0`, `x1`, ... style. The generator matches the task family by keeping grids fixed at `10x10`, placing only singleton pixels in the leftmost column, sampling `7-8` active rows, forcing all four official colors to appear, capping each color count at `3`, and deriving output from the same latent row/color assignment. No new shared primitive was added.

Validation passed end-to-end:
- Official examples: `pass f45f5ca7: 4/4 official examples passed`
- Build: `1000` verified generated examples plus artifacts
- Visual sanity check: [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/previews/preview_01.png) looked on-distribution against [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/previews/originals.png)

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/task.json), [000.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/examples/000.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f45f5ca7/previews/preview_03.png).
